article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.14. CR - Cisco WebEx Contact Center License Subscriptions 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Council to vote on $394,942 Cisco WebEx Contact Center license renewal for Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to vote on renewing a three-year software contract with Long View Systems Corporation to keep the City's phone-based customer service system running from May 2026 to May 2029, at an estimated cost of $394,942 including taxes.

key_dates.label: Burnaby Cisco WebEx Contact Center contract renewal period begins
